examples: If you don't have money, you're powerless.
I saw what was happening, but I was powerless to help.
The twin lights, the shifting grey and the steadfast red, mastered the Water Rat and held him bound, fascinated, powerless.
The character is later confronted by a homeowner, channeling powerless rage so many Louisianans know.
Consumers are learning they do have a collective voice and they are not powerless.
